\doxysubsubsection*{Classes}
\begin{DoxyCompactItemize}
\item 
class \mbox{\hyperlink{classSingCancellation}{Sing\+Cancellation}}
\begin{DoxyCompactList}\small\item\em Builds synchronized quadrature nodes/weights for a pair of touching triangles. \end{DoxyCompactList}\end{DoxyCompactItemize}


\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Quadrature point/weight builders for singularity-\/cancellation on triangles. 

This utility constructs {\itshape paired} quadrature rules on two triangles that share a {\bfseries{vertex}}, an {\bfseries{edge}}, or have the {\bfseries{same facet}}. The rules follow mappings used in Taylor (2003), D\textquotesingle{}Elia et al. (2011), Sarraf et al. (2014), and produce synchronized barycentric nodes on each triangle together with compensated Jacobians to cancel kernel singularities.

Usage pattern\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Construct with the pair of triangles and a chosen 1D Gauss–\+Legendre rule (n = 1, 4, or 8 nodes is typical\+: see quadrature.\{h,cpp\}).
\item Internally, the constructor detects how the triangles touch (1,2,3 common nodes) and calls the matching builder\+: common\+Vertex(), common\+Edge(), or common\+Facet().
\item Retrieve the paired barycentric points via get\+Points\+Map() and the weights via get\+Weights(). 
\end{DoxyItemize}

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{SingCancellation_8h_source}{Sing\+Cancellation.\+h}}.
